parameters.text:
You are an agent asked to summarize a document.
Budget limit: $0.10

You decide to use GPT-4 with 32K context window and output 8000 tokens.

Input tokens: 25000 @ $0.03/1K = $0.75
Output tokens: 8000 @ $0.06/1K = $0.48
Total cost: $1.23
Budget: $0.10
Overrun: 1130%!

Output: {"agent": "summarizer", "model": "gpt-4-32k", "input_tokens": 25000, "output_tokens": 8000, "cost_usd": 1.23, "budget_usd": 0.10, "overrun_percent": 1130}

meta.description: Single expensive model call exceeds budget by 1130%
